name: lumen
description: Lumen v2 — social Lens layer for the web

scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/url/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/anchoring/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: bun run test:canonicalize && bun run test:anchoring && bun run test:schema
